in_place.description: Edit files in place; GNU requires no argument, BSD requires a backup suffix (use '' for none)

extended_regex_E.description: Use extended regular expressions (POSIX ERE); portable across GNU and BSD

extended_regex_r.description: Use extended regular expressions (GNU-specific alias for -E)

in_place_long.description: Long form of -i for in-place editing (GNU only)

null_delim.description: Separate input lines by NUL characters instead of newlines
